name.description: The name of the scheduler schedule.

description.description: The description of the scheduler schedule.

schedule_expression.description: The schedule expression (e.g. rate(5 minutes) or cron(0 20 * * ? *)).

flexible_time_window_mode.description: Determines whether the schedule is invoked within a flexible time window. Valid values: OFF, FLEXIBLE.

group_name.description: The name of the schedule group to associate with the schedule.

start_date.description: The date, in UTC, after which the schedule can begin invoking its target.

end_date.description: The date, in UTC, before which the schedule can invoke its target.

schedule_expression_timezone.description: The timezone in which the scheduling expression is evaluated.

kms_key_arn.description: The ARN of the KMS key to use for encryption.

state.description: Specifies whether the schedule is enabled or disabled. Valid values: ENABLED, DISABLED.

target_arn.description: The ARN of the target for the schedule.

target_role_arn.description: The ARN of the IAM role that the scheduler assumes when invoking the target.

target_input.description: The JSON text passed to the target. If not set, no input is passed.
